description.value:
You've unlocked a deeper connection to the depths of emptiness that voidborns call home. This connection allows you to travel through hidden spaces while avoiding the attention of others. While @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Undetected] by all non-allies in an area of dim light or darkness, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Sneak] without attempting a Stealth check so long as you move less than 15 feet and don't pass within 15 feet of an enemy during your movement.

During exploration, this also allows you to automatically approach within 20 feet of other creatures while @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Avoid Notice]{Avoiding their Notice} in an area of dim light or darkness, as long as they aren't actively @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Search]{Searching} or on guard.
